feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Highlight Critical materials in IH01
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to highlight Critical materials in yellow in IH01.  I have looked at BADI_EAM_STRUCTURE_LIST but I can't figure out how to make that work or if it is the correct BADI.  It is used in Form OBJECT_TYPE_COLOR in program RIIFLO10, Include MIHIXF40.  All materials are red and we would like the Critical materials to stand out and be highlighted in yellow. 

Thank you for any suggestions.

entry.title: S4HANA GUI missing insert delete button on Notif DMS
entry.content:
S4HANA GUI notification not showing the insert and delete button. However it is showing on the Fiori app.

S4HANA VS ECC GUI notification- Document tab

Fiori App

Please provide any inputs to correct this issue. Thanks!

entry.title: How can a VBA script "read" the contents of a SAP table?
entry.content:
Hello, everyone. I hope you all are having a lovely day.

I have a VBA script that extracts some data from SAP PM. It goes into IW29, chooses a specific variant and loads the notifications. Then, it selects all of them to show the relevant orders. After loading the orders, it needs to select a specific display variant before extracting the information to an Excel file. The way this is done is as follows:

When selecting the menu option to select a display variant, SAP opens a table. Each row is a different variable. The script has, defined within the code, the index of the variant I'm interested in and selects the corresponding row.

The problem is when the index for the variant changes for some reason (i.e. a new variant before it was created. SAP sorts the variants in the table in alphabetical order). When this happens, I have to manually look for the new index and change the value in the code.

Is there a way to make the script autohandle this? I thought about reading the 1st column of every row and, when the content matches a predefined string within the code, the script selects that row, but I have no idea on how to do this...

I'll share the relevant part of the code below. A couple notes about it:

  • The SAP I use is in Portuguese, so my bad if I mistranslated something
  • For those that don't know, the ' symbol is what's used to create comments in VBS/VBA. I also highlighted the comments in green, just like in VBA

CODE:
===============================================================================

' IW39 EXTRACTION
' ACCESSING IW29
  session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/okcd").Text = "/nIW29"
  session.findById("wnd[0]").sendVKey 0

' LOOKING FOR NOTIFICATION VARIANT
  session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[1]/btn[17]").press ' Button "Call variant"
  session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/txtV-LOW").Text = "<insert any variant here>" ' Selecting the notifications variant
  session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/txtENAME-LOW").Text = "" ' Clears the field "Created by"
  session.findById("wnd[1]/tbar[0]/btn[8]").press ' Press F8

' RUNNING IW29
  session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[1]/btn[8]").press ' Press F8

' ACCESSING THE ORDERS FROM THE NOTIFICATIONS
  session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/cntlGRID1/shellcont/shell").setCurrentCell -1, ""
  session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/cntlGRID1/shellcont/shell").SelectAll ' Button on the top left that selects all notifications
  session.findById("wnd[0]/mbar/menu[4]/menu[0]").Select ' Environment ---> Orders

' SELECTING THE DISPLAY VARIANT (the problem lies here)
  session.findById("wnd[0]/mbar/menu[5]/menu[2]/menu[1]").Select ' Configurations ---> Display Variants ---> Call...  
 session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ssubD0500_SUBSCREEN:SAPLSLVC_DIALOG:0501/cntlG51_CONTAINER/shellcont/shell").setCurrentCell IndexIW39, "TEXT" ' <insert any variant here>. The variable "IndexIW39" is a number defined elsewhere. It represents the row of the desired variant in the table that's on the screen at this point 
 session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ssubD0500_SUBSCREEN:SAPLSLVC_DIALOG:0501/cntlG51_CONTAINER/shellcont/shell").selectedRows = CStr(IndiceIW39) ' CStr converts the "IndexIW39" value to a string 
 session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ssubD0500_SUBSCREEN:SAPLSLVC_DIALOG:0501/cntlG51_CONTAINER/shellcont/shell").clickCurrentCell

' code continues after this point...

===============================================================================

 IMPORTANT: If you'd like to run this script yourself, the next bit of code is mandatory BEFORE the previous code, as it is this second piece of code that allows VBS/VBA to interact with SAP:
===============================================================================

' CONNECTING WITH SAP
  If Not IsObject(app) Then
    Set SapGuiAuto = GetObject("SAPGUI")
    Set app = SapGuiAuto.GetScriptingEngine
  End If

  If Not IsObject(Connection) Then
    Set Connection = app.Children(0)
  End If

  If Not IsObject(session) Then
    Set session = Connection.Children(0)
  End If

  If IsObject(WScript) Then
    WScript.ConnectObject session, "on"
    WScript.ConnectObject app, "on"
  End If

  session.findById("wnd[0]").maximize

===============================================================================

You can use a .xlsm or .vbs file to run the script.
Pro tip: in an Excel file (.xlsm) you can run the script step by step pressing F8 in the Visual Script window. You can also add breakpoints.

entry.title: Change service order notification header using BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN
entry.content:
Hello SAP community, 

We want to update header notification for an already existing service order with already created notif.

I have one service order eg: NZ12YBO00085 to which a header notification is already assigned eg :301714374 , this notification exists also in object list. what i want to do is to update header notification to another one eg: 301714338 and adding this once also to object list. i tried using BAPI BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN like follow: 

in table IT_HEADER , i put service order ID NZ12YBO00085 and new notif ID 301714338 

in table IT_HEADER_UP : i put service order ID NZ12YBO00085 and i put 'X' in notif number

in table IT_OBJECTLIST : i put NOTIF_NO : 301714338 and COUNTER : 0

in table IT_OBJECTLIST_UP: i put 'X' in PROCESSING_IND

But i'm getting this result, and nothing is done notif is not updated neither added to object list

I tried with COMMIT also, tried just method change without create objeect list but still nothing is changed. Could anyone help please ?

Thank you

entry.title: Maintenance Plan has plan dt too far in the future. last complete 6/2024 next dt 09/2026
entry.content:
the Maintenace plan is a strategy plan on a 4Mo, YYR cycle.

The last order was completed 6/13/2024 the next plan date is 10/1/2026  to be called 9/13/2026

I have attached images of the scheduling list

entry.title: Add fields to IW32/Iw33 under operation tab
entry.content: On SAP IW32 or IW33 screen under operation tab you can add or hide some fields .  In production when I tried to adding fields on this screen, I see limited fields.  So there is difference between Q environment and production. In production I can hide or hide fields but the fields that I want to show are not visible all the fields are standard fields and they are already visible in Q environment. Can any one help how to add fields to W32 or IW33 screen under operation tab.

entry.title: Functional Location data is not appearing in IK17
entry.content:
Hi Team,

When we input Functional Location in IK17 and execute we are getting No objects found but we have measuring documents for Functional Location. Can you please help us on this.

Regards,

Preethi

entry.title: Asset transfer from (buliding asset to land asset)
entry.content:
Hi all 

I wanna to ask you when i did transfer asset within company code from asset class (building) to asset class (land) there is accum. Dep. has been transfered as well. Logically the receiver asset which the (land) asset class shall not dep. so how I adjust this accumulation dep posted on land asset in addition in future what the proper asset transfer in same this case when transfer from class dep. to another class not dep. 

waiting your usual support!

thank you !

entry.title: Good day, we are planning to integrate S4HANA Private cloud & Maximo, any idea how to start ?
entry.content:
we are planning to integrate s4hana asset management and Maximo 

1st Scenario

work orders with operations will be done in Maximo then pr will be triggered for external services in sap and budget check will happen in sap then services & material purchasing with reference to contract till invoice and settlement will be done in sap then we want to update work orders in Maximo later.

2nd scenario

contracts will be created in sap then they want it to be created in Maximo then in Maximo service entry sheets will be created based on subcontractor performance we want to interface SES back to sap 

we need to integrate using APIs and i need clear vision on how to do to integration and requirements from both systems from hardware , software & Business?

entry.title: is there field for equipment number in P.R and P.O screen in MM
entry.content:
is there field for equipment number in P.R and P.O screen in MM 

My customer needs to have a reports for all purchased spare parts and services for an equipment 

Without the need to display P.M order to know the equipment

entry.title: Clarification about BS22 Changes for System Status in SAP maintained table
entry.content:
Do SAP consider changes made in T Code: BS22 as custom modifications or SAP allows customers to make changes in this SAP Maintained table and consider it as Standard configuration?

I0045 TECO Technically completed

Standard setup provided for TECO is that a TECO'ed Production Order cannot be used in a Purchase Order.

But Business want to use a TECO Production Order in a Purchase Order, and to achieve this we should change the standard setting from "Forbidden" to "Allowed" in BS22.

I want to know whether this is allowed by SAP or do SAP consider this as custom modification and will stop supporting in this area after we make this change.

entry.title: Auto Release of Orders In Fiori
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can we auto release maintenance orders in fiori when the order is saved?

entry.title: Unable to delete the released work order
entry.content:
Hi Team,

When we try to delete the released work orders through the below programs we are unable to delete them:

Preparation program - Set deletion flag / deletion indicator

RIARCORV / RIARCORVS

The WRITE program - Generate the archive file

RIARCORA / RIARCORAS

The DELETION program - Remove the order records from main database tables

RIARCORD / RIARCORDS 

Can you please help me on this.

Regards,

Preethi

entry.title: Mandatory fields in Fiori condition based
entry.content:
Hi Community,

we did a customizing to make the Fields Defect Type VIQMFE.FEGRP and Short Text Damage Code RIWO00.TXTCDFE mandatory for a specific Notificationtype.

In ERP everything is working well, also when a Repair Order inclusive notification is technically completed the System complains about the missing values.

But how can we get it work in Fiori App F2023 that the Defect Type and Short Text Damage Code are treated there also mandatory for a specific Notification Type.

Kind Regards

Marcus

entry.title: PM notification and order
entry.content:
Hello, I have an issue related to PM. When I fill in a field on the IW21 screen, how can I ensure that this data automatically appears when I convert it to a work order in IW32? For example, if I enter something in the Items or Tasks (in IW21), I want these fields to automatically show up in the IW32 screen when the order is converted. Is there a standard solution or a way to achieve this using BADI or something? 

Thank you in advance

entry.title: PM Order operation list
entry.content:
Hello.
I have an issue about PM order operation list.
The user wants to add the operations in the notification from a catalog.
These operations from the catalog have to integrate to the order's operation.
Our first solution is using the "Tasks" in the notification. We wanted to use the "Tasks" with its catalog, then we tried to find the order operation list's changing function.
So, we try to find the alternative solution for the requirement.

Looking forward your solutions.
Thanks a lot.

entry.title: Enhancement in IW42
entry.content:
Hi,
We have some enhancements done in T Code: IW42- Overall Order Confirmation in ECC for some field validations and while we are moving to SAP S/4 HANA 2023 and we plan to activate the SAP GUI App for IW42 which is available in Fiori Apps Library. I like to know whether all the enhancements which we have currently done in IW42 in ECC will reflect in the SAP GUI App for IW42?

Do we need any further adjustments to ensure all enhancements in IW42 ECC is available in this app as well in S/4 HANA 2023?

 

SAP

entry.title: since SAP Update it´s not possible to export data as a text file with tcode IW37n
entry.content: since SAP Update it´s not possible to export data as a text file with tcode IW37Nbefore SAP updateafter SAP update

entry.title: Multiple Equipment in one Work Order for Planned Maintenance
entry.content:
Limit the number of Work Orders for Planned Maintenance, while still covering detailed proof of inspection, precise document assignment and cost allocation.

 

Context

Conflicting objectives: Settlement rules according to SAP standard vs. efficient work order processing
SAP standard: one maintenance plan for many equipment has correspondingly many maintenance items; each maintenance item generates a work order with one equipment as reference object; apart from that, all these many work orders have the same content; the settlement rule of each work order is created with the account assignment of the reference object - this is not satisfactory

Alternative that could be programmed: Put all equipment on the object list of one maintenance item; generate thus only one work order with an invalid reference object but all equipment on the object list; generate the settlement rule distributed equally across the account assignment of each equipment on the object list.

Could anyone suggest a Standard process for this request? Thanks!

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) SAP EAM Work Order

entry.title: Standard Text Key in Fiori apps for maintenance orders
entry.content:
Dear,

A particular customer wishes to use the standard text field (AFVGD-KTSCH) in the operations overview for maintenance orders and task lists :

This field is still available when using the SAP GUI in S/4HANA ( as you can see in printscreen above),however in the Fiori applications for both Public and Private Cloud S/4HANA this field is no longer displayed in apps such as: " Change Maintenance Order", " Manage Maintenance Notifications & Orders", " Create Task list" etc.
We have also checked the settings button in the operation overview and the field is nowhere to be found:

Has this field been removed in Fiori or can it be added through development or configuration?

Thank you
